title: jasminum polyanthum
intro: Jasminum polyanthum, also known as the Pink Jasmine or Chinese Pink Jasmine, is a type of flowering plant in the Oleaceae family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. It is known for its fragrant, star-shaped flowers and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Jasminum polyanthum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
